body: [{"ac":1,"text":"With api_key valid and the stubbed /api/v1/credits returning {data:{total_credits: 0}} (or current zero-balance shape), routing_decision exposes openrouter candidate with eligible=false, FilterReason=credit_exhausted, Reason text contains the observed balance. Integration test via httptest.NewServer.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"With api_key valid and the stubbed /api/v1/credits returning a balance \u003e threshold, candidate is eligible=true. Verified by the existing happy-path test pattern (no regression).","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"/api/v1/credits is called at most once per TTL window across N back-to-back routing decisions. Verified by atomic counter in the stub and N=3 calls.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"A transport failure (server.Close before the first probe) produces FilterReason=provider_unreachable for the freshness window; a follow-up routing pass after the stub recovers produces eligible=true with a fresh probe. Test asserts both observations.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"HTTP 401 from /api/v1/credits surfaces as FilterReason=credential_invalid (distinct from credential_missing from sibling bead).","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":6,"text":"Configurable threshold for credit_exhausted is documented; default value ($0.50) named in the docs. File path: docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-005-provider-config.md OR a new file under the openrouter provider docs section.","kind":"mechanical","verifiable":true},{"ac":7,"text":"cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau \u0026\u0026 go test ./... green.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":8,"text":"No regression in service_adr005_test.go or service_routing_test.go.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false}]
